About_&_Key_Points:
About
IndiaMART, the first and largest B2B digital marketplace in the country, today stands out as a game-changer on the B2B landscape. It focuses on integrating the Small and Medium Businesses (SMEs) into the new paradigm with speed and ease, we are constantly pushing the frontiers of innovation to make the online marketplace more accessible, visible and engaging to them.
[1]
Key Points
Business Overview
[1]
IndiaMART operates India's largest online B2B marketplace, connecting buyers and suppliers across diverse industries. The platform enables product discovery, lead generation, and business transactions through offerings such as web storefronts, priority listings, RFQ services, BuyLead credits, CRM tools, and cloud telephony solutions. It's technology-driven matchmaking engine helps efficiently connect buyers with relevant suppliers based on their business requirements.
